---
title: "Mathematical Foundations of Machine Learning"
---

<div class="updated-time">Updated: 2026-04-07 12:00 AEDT</div>

This section collects notes on the mathematical foundations used in machine learning.
Tag legend: `Definition` marks a definition, `Theory` marks a theorem or principle, `Inference` marks a derivation step, and `Result` marks a conclusion or application takeaway.

<div class="note-cards">
<div class="note-card">
<a href="1%20Orthogonality.md">Orthogonality</a>
<div class="card-desc">Orthogonal decomposition, projection, Gram-Schmidt</div>
</div>
<div class="note-card subfolder">
<a href="Nonlinear-Dynamics/index.qmd">Nonlinear Dynamics</a><span class="card-badge">subfolder</span>
<div class="card-desc">Phase portraits, bifurcations, laser models</div>
</div>
<div class="note-card">
<a href="3%20Linear-Algebra%20Four%20Subspaces.md">Four Fundamental Subspaces</a>
<div class="card-desc">Column / row / null spaces, least squares</div>
</div>
<div class="note-card">
<a href="4%20Langevin%20Dynamics%20and%20Diffusion%20Model.md">Langevin Dynamics and Diffusion Model</a>
<div class="card-desc">Stochastic dynamics, score matching</div>
</div>
<div class="note-card">
<a href="5%20Lagrangian%20and%20Hamiltonian%20Mechanics.md">Analytical Mechanics</a>
<div class="card-desc">Lagrangian, Hamiltonian, symplectic structure</div>
</div>
<div class="note-card">
<a href="6%20SGD,%20Momentum,%20and%20Potential%20Dynamics.md">SGD, Momentum, and Potential Dynamics</a>
<div class="card-desc">Gradient flow, momentum, potential energy landscape</div>
</div>
</div>
